justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, including specific times and broader morning windows.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives by expanding the search to adjacent days and broader timeframes when initial requests were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent maintained context and did not ask for information already provided, but the repeated apologies for unavailability slightly reduced efficiency.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with the agent being polite and ultimately finding a suitable appointment, though the repeated apologies could be a minor friction point.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by expanding the search intelligently to other days and broader time ranges when initial requests were unavailable, maintaining full context.
